description: Pure state reducer — transforms RunState given bus commands (StartRun, AdvanceRun, ApplyCommand), returns new state + effects.

files.responsibility: Pure reducer: maps (RunState, command) → ReduceResult(new state, effects). Handles StartRun (hydrate messages), AdvanceRun (bump turn, emit ExecuteLlmStep), ApplyCommand (cancel/steer/follow_up/human_response).
Reducer output — new RunState + list of effect commands to dispatch.
